title: epidendrum quadrangulatum
intro: Epidendrum quadrangulatum, also known as the Four-Sided Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Epidendrum quadrangulatum include its ability to help treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to protect against certain types of bacteria and viruses. The plant is typically harvested for its roots and leaves, which are then used to prepare herbal infusions, tinctures, and decoctions.
